Name: Marcus Webb
Flavor_Text: Fourteen years flying fixed-wing before switching to UAS. Still prefers a horizon.

Name: Jordan Holt
Flavor_Text: Tracks raptor migration corridors. The birds don't mind her anymore.

Name: Dana Reyes
Flavor_Text: Former EMT. Runs SAR operations across three county jurisdictions.

Name: Eli Fontaine
Flavor_Text: Specializes in bridge and tower inspection. Never uses a ladder anymore.

Name: Kwame Osei
Flavor_Text: Monitors wetland health along the Gulf Coast. Published in three journals.

Name: Tara Singh
Flavor_Text: Wrote the airspace deconfliction protocol used by six fire agencies.

Name: Ben Calloway
Flavor_Text: Combines NDVI data with soil reports. Farmers call him before they call the county.

Name: Yuki Tanaka
Flavor_Text: Handles everything from shot planning to post. One-person production unit.

Name: Rosa Delgado
Flavor_Text: Maps invasive species corridors across riparian zones in the Southwest.

Name: Atlas
Flavor_Text: No operator on file. Deployed remotely. Always on time.

Name: Priya Nair
Flavor_Text: Processes multispectral data faster than most people collect it.

Name: Cal Ruiz
Flavor_Text: Night operations specialist. Thermal imaging saved eleven lives last year.

Name: Mei Ling
Flavor_Text: Surveys storm damage across four states. Faster than any ground crew.

Name: Omar Hassan
Flavor_Text: Certified structural inspector. Found seventeen cracks the last team missed.

Name: Lily Chen
Flavor_Text: Studies old growth canopy health. Has named more trees than people.

Name: Andre Moss
Flavor_Text: Twenty years in news. Still chases the shot nobody else gets.

Name: Sasha Kowalski
Flavor_Text: Reads fire behavior from above. Incident command trusts her maps.

Name: Tom Garrett
Flavor_Text: Runs variable rate application plans for corn and soy operations.

Name: Nadia Flores
Flavor_Text: Surveys coastal kelp beds and reef systems. Works from a converted research vessel.

Name: Simone Adler
Flavor_Text: Her reel includes three feature films and a Super Bowl spot.

Name: Camille Okonkwo
Flavor_Text: Studies the line where farmland meets wilderness. Both sides need her.
